ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "college" TEXT /* Player's alma mater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the CFL team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is part of */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "grey_cup_date" TEXT /* Date of the Grey Cup game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's season statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for that season */,
  "regular_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of regular season games played */,
  "playoff_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games played */,
  "grey_cup_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of Grey Cup games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "total_tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Total sacks by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of game */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type (e.g., Regular, Playoff, Grey Cup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's statistics */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's season statistics */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of game played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "player_performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the player during the game */,
  "game_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "player_rating" REAL /* Player rating for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES player_season_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the team is part of */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "fantasy_team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the fantasy team */,
  "fantasy_team_description" TEXT /* Description of the fantasy team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
